title: euphrasia nemorosa
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa, also known as woodland eyebright, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa include its ability to soothe and calm the eyes, as well as to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Euphrasia nemorosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat eye infections and respiratory problems.
